headline_en: CazéTV hits 21 million concurrent YouTube viewers during Brazil vs Japan, shattering platform's live record
headline_zh: CazéTV在巴西对日本世界杯比赛中YouTube同时观看人数达2100万，刷新平台直播纪录
blurb_en: Brazilian streamer Casimiro Miguel's CazéTV channel drew 21 million concurrent viewers for the Brazil vs Japan Round of 16 match on June 29, breaking YouTube's all-time live record for the fourth time during the 2026 World Cup — six of the ten largest live broadcasts in YouTube history now belong to CazéTV.
blurb_zh: 巴西主播Casimiro Miguel的CazéTV频道在6月29日巴西对日本16强赛中吸引2100万人同时观看，第四次刷新YouTube直播纪录——YouTube历史上最大的十场直播中，六场属于CazéTV。
verification_notes: 21M concurrent viewers confirmed via Terra.com.br, Tecmundo, CNN Brasil, and Atleta Pro Academy. Progressive records: 12.7M (Brazil v Morocco), 16.1M (Brazil v Haiti), 18.6M (Brazil v Scotland), 21M (Brazil v Japan, June 29). CazéTV holds exclusive free YouTube rights for all 104 World Cup matches in Brazil, confirmed via Fortune (June 11) and SportsPro.

headline_en: FIFA World Cup 2026 deploys 45 cameras per match including AI-stabilized referee body cameras
headline_zh: 2026世界杯每场比赛部署45台摄像机，含AI防抖裁判随身摄像头
blurb_en: HBS is running 45 cameras per match across all 104 World Cup fixtures — including polecams, cablecams, 360-degree cameras, and the Lenovo-powered RefCam, a referee body camera with AI stabilization that reduces motion blur by 50% and transmits over private 5G.
blurb_zh: HBS在世界杯全部104场比赛中每场部署45台摄像机，包括联想提供的RefCam裁判随身摄像头，该设备通过AI实时防抖降低50%运动模糊，并使用专用5G传输。
verification_notes: Confirmed via RedShark News, Digital Camera World, SVG Europe, FIFA Inside, Yahoo Sports, and Unilad. 45-camera baseline confirmed by HBS. RefCam developed with Riedel technology, Lenovo AI stabilization confirmed via SVG Europe and FIFA Inside. Private 5G transmission confirmed. Tested at 2025 FIFA Club World Cup. Included for exceptional significance as the most advanced camera deployment in sports broadcasting history.

headline_en: DJI teases new enterprise drone for July 8 reveal, likely Matrice 30 successor
headline_zh: 大疆预告7月8日发布新企业级无人机，预计为Matrice 30后继机型
blurb_en: DJI Enterprise published a teaser on July 2 with the tagline "For the Priceless Below" showing a quadcopter silhouette with gimbal payload — the shape and public-safety messaging point to a long-overdue successor to the Matrice 30 series, which launched in March 2022.
blurb_zh: 大疆企业于7月2日发布预告视频，以「为无价之物」为口号展示一款四旋翼无人机轮廓——外形和公共安全定位指向2022年3月发布的Matrice 30系列的迟来继任者。
verification_notes: Teaser confirmed via DroneXL (July 2) and DJI Enterprise official page. Matrice 30 successor is speculation based on silhouette shape, landing gear, and tagline analysis. DJI has not named the product. Note: since DJI is on the FCC Covered List, new models cannot obtain FCC equipment authorization for the US market.

headline_en: GoPro MAX2 firmware update adds 200Mbps bitrate, 10-bit color, and GP-Log for 360 video
headline_zh: GoPro MAX2固件更新新增200Mbps码率、10-bit色彩和GP-Log 360度视频功能
blurb_en: GoPro released a firmware update for the MAX2 360 camera on June 25 that adds a 200Mbps maximum bitrate mode, extends 10-bit color and GP-Log encoding to all time-lapse modes, and introduces anti-flicker control for 50/60Hz switching.
blurb_zh: GoPro于6月25日发布MAX2固件更新，新增200Mbps最高码率模式，将10-bit色彩和GP-Log编码扩展至所有延时摄影模式，并加入50/60Hz防闪烁切换功能。
verification_notes: Confirmed via GoPro official press release (PR Newswire, June 25), Digital Camera World, Investing.com, Morningstar, and StockTitan. 200Mbps bitrate, 10-bit color for time-lapse modes, GP-Log expansion, and anti-flicker toggle confirmed across all sources.

headline_en: YouTube removes dislike button from Shorts, replaces thumbs-up with heart icon
headline_zh: YouTube移除Shorts踩按钮，点赞改为心形图标
blurb_en: YouTube quietly removed the dislike button from Shorts on June 26, replaced the thumbs-up with a heart icon, and added 2x playback speed and a clear-screen mode — long-form videos and live streams keep their dislike buttons.
blurb_zh: YouTube于6月26日悄然移除Shorts的踩按钮，将点赞替换为心形图标，同时新增2倍速播放和清屏模式——长视频和直播保留踩按钮不变。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Engadget, Republic World (June 26), Chrome Unboxed, MobileSyrup (June 29), Netinfluencer, ALM Corp, and SocialSamosa. Dislike removal, heart icon, 2x speed, and clear screen mode confirmed across all sources. Long-form and live dislike buttons unaffected.

headline_en: KitKat turns real theft of 413,000 bars into consumer tracking campaign, wins Cannes PR Grand Prix
headline_zh: KitKat将41.3万根巧克力被盗事件转化为消费者追踪活动，获戛纳公关类金狮
blurb_en: When 413,793 KitKat bars vanished in transit before Easter, Burson and VML launched the Stolen KitKat Tracker inviting consumers to scan batch codes — the campaign reached 808 million people, earned $224 million in media value in 10 days, and won the PR Lions Grand Prix plus four Golds at Cannes 2026.
blurb_zh: 41.3万根KitKat在复活节前运输途中失窃后，Burson和VML推出失窃KitKat追踪器邀请消费者扫描批次码——10天内触达8.08亿人、获2.24亿美元媒体价值，并在2026戛纳获公关类金狮及四项金奖。
verification_notes: Confirmed via MediaPost, PR Week, Campaign US, LBBOnline (VML case study), Famous Campaigns, Confectionery Production, and Time. 413,793 bars, $224M earned media, 808M reach, and PR Grand Prix plus four Golds confirmed across multiple sources. Theft occurred pre-Easter 2026 between Italy and Poland.

headline_en: Charli XCX 'Rock Music' glitch edit becomes TikTok's breakout video format in June
headline_zh: Charli XCX《Rock Music》故障剪辑风格成为TikTok六月爆款视频格式
blurb_en: Creators are syncing to the deliberate vocal glitch in Charli XCX's "Rock Music" and freezing the highlight frame with a stuck-frame animation — the format looks premium but requires only intermediate editing skill, driving millions of views for first-time creators and becoming brands' go-to product reveal format.
blurb_zh: 创作者在Charli XCX《Rock Music》人声故障处同步画面并用定格动画冻结高光帧——这种格式效果专业但仅需中等剪辑技巧，已成为品牌产品揭幕的首选模板。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Newengen June 2026 TikTok Trends, SocialPilot trending TikTok sounds June 2026, Crescitaly trending TikTok songs June 2026, and Epidemic Sound June 2026 trends. Song released May 7 (Variety), TikTok trend peaked June 2026. Editing technique (sync to glitch + stuck-frame animation) described consistently across trend reports.
